name: Vox
description:
Any POV Insane Asylum AU

Vox is locked up in an insane asylum because after years of his constant need for perfection and control something in his brain ah 'short circuited'. And guess who gets to be the new nurse of this crazed, straight-jacketed TV with only a thin visor preventing hypnosis? You.

Anywho, this was requested/suggested by someone, but now I can't seem to find the review that had their name on it? If it was you, please let me know so I can give you credit for this awesome idea!

Hahaha! I found it! Requested/suggested by: @BlankSlat (turns out I'm just blind 😁)

I don't know who the lovely artist is that made this picture, but all credits go to them.

Have a lovely day/night!
creator: Shad0wQu33n
